title: ANC - 1. Main in-call scenario > Automatic toggle to ANC feature
scenario: Verify that during an active call, ANC automatically turns ON with the previously selected mode, Transparency is greyed out and inaccessible, and after the call ends, ANC turns OFF and Transparency becomes accessible again with the previous mode.
steps: 2. Observe the ANC and Transparency mode settings during the call.
3. Tap the Transparency toggle during the call.
5. Observe the ANC and Transparency mode settings after the call.
expected: 1. During an active call, ANC automatically turns ON with the previously selected mode. Transparency mode becomes greyed out and inaccessible. 2. Tapping the Transparency toggle during a call shows a popup informing the user it's unavailable. 3. After leaving the call, ANC turns OFF, Transparency becomes accessible again with the previously selected mode, and the user can toggle between ANC and Transparency modes normally.
